code_value: Hello, everyone. Let me talk about some of my favourite Chinese festivals. The first one is the Lantern Festival. On that day, I often go to watch dragon dances with my friends. The second one is the Mid-Autumn Festival. It is a time for the family to get together. I usually visit my grandparents in the countryside on that day. Our family have a food party to celebrate the festival. The last one is the Spring Festival. On the day before the Spring Festival, my parents prepare a big dinner for the whole family. We eat dumplings, meat and some other nice food.

ets_th1 When does the speaker watch dragon dances?</br>ets_th2 What do the speaker's family do to celebrate the Mid-Autumn Festival?</br>ets_th3 What do the speaker's family eat on the day before the Spring Festival?</br>ets_th4 How many Chinese festivals does the speaker talk about?
